Package org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.impl

Class AttributeImpl

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.BasicNotifierImpl
org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.BasicEObjectImpl
org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.EObjectImpl
org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.impl.LightObjectImpl
org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.impl.AttributeImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.InternalEObject, ILAttribute, Attribute, LightObject
public class AttributeImpl extends LightObjectImpl implements Attribute
An implementation of the model object 'Attribute'.

The following features are implemented:

  • Type
  • Value
  • EOwner
  • Entry
  • Key
